description:
Configure custom campaign dispositions for the 'Political Survey Campaign' (ID: SURVEY01) in the Vicidial Admin Interface.

Credentials:
- User: 6666
- Password: andromeda
- URL: http://localhost/vicidial/admin.php

Add the following 6 statuses to Campaign SURVEY01. All must have 'Selectable' = Y and 'Human Answered' = Y. Ensure all other flags (Sale, DNC, etc.) are N unless specified below.

1. SVCOMP - 'Survey Completed' (Sale: Y, Customer Contact: Y)
2. REFUSD - 'Refused to Participate' (Not Interested: Y)
3. PARTL - 'Partial Survey' (Customer Contact: Y)
4. SCHEDL - 'Schedule Callback' (Scheduled Callback: Y)
5. LNGBAR - 'Language Barrier'
6. WRNGNO - 'Wrong Number' (Unworkable: Y)
